customerReg.subtitle: Create your account to save requests and continue your event planning.
customerReg.leftDesc: Save event requests, discover premium caterers, and continue planning from your personal dashboard.
customerReg.termsNote: By continuing, you agree to Speisely’s terms and privacy policy.
customerReg.benefit1Desc: Start with a short idea and refine your catering brief later.
customerReg.benefit2Desc: Compare curated partners, review matches, and manage your requests in one place.
empty.bookingsDesc: Booking requests will appear here once customers book.
empty.paymentsDesc: Payments will appear here after bookings are completed.
empty.availabilityDesc: Confirmed booking dates will show here.
empty.verificationDesc: Please log in as a caterer.
empty.caterersDesc: When caterers sign up they will appear here for review.
about.value1Desc: Speisely transforms natural-language event requests into a clearer catering brief so customers can start faster and discover more relevant partners.
about.value2Desc: We focus on a more premium and trustworthy catering experience with clearer presentation, stronger positioning, and a more selective marketplace feel.
about.value3Desc: Customers get a smoother planning flow, while caterers receive more structured inquiries that are easier to understand and respond to.
about.whyDesc1: Many catering platforms feel like simple directories. Customers often have an idea in mind, but not a perfect specification. Caterers, on the other hand, need better context to respond well.
about.whyDesc2: Speisely sits between those two needs. It helps customers express what they want in a more natural way, then structures that intent into something more useful for matching, browsing, and booking.
about.aiDesc1: Speisely uses AI as a layer of interpretation and guidance. A user can describe an event in plain language, and the system can help identify signals like occasion, city, guest count, dietary needs, service style, and budget direction.
about.aiDesc2: The goal is not AI for the sake of AI. The goal is a better request flow, stronger partner discovery, and a smoother premium experience from homepage to shortlist.
about.approachTitle: Built around a smarter hospitality flow
about.approachSubtitle: Speisely is designed to feel less like a cluttered listing site and more like a premium planning experience.
about.principle1Title: Start with the event, not filters
about.principle1Desc: Instead of sending people into an endless directory, Speisely begins with the occasion, intent, and event details.
about.principle2Title: Turn rough ideas into structured briefs
about.principle2Desc: A short request like Wedding for 80 guests in Berlin becomes a clearer starting point for matching, browsing, and inquiry.
about.principle3Desc: From homepage to request flow to dashboard, Speisely is designed to feel polished, premium, and easier to trust.
about.customersTitle: From vague idea to better shortlist
about.customersDesc: Customers often know the feeling or outcome they want, but not the exact catering language. Speisely helps bridge that gap through a guided experience that starts with natural intent and moves toward more structured planning.
about.caterersDesc: Caterers benefit from a more premium presentation layer and from incoming requests that are more structured than a simple message. That creates better clarity, stronger positioning, and more useful leads.
about.ctaTitle: Start with your event, not a directory.
about.ctaSubtitle: Tell Speisely what you are planning and continue into a smarter, more premium catering journey.

catererReg.successDesc: Thank you! Your registration is under review. We will notify you by email once your account has been activated.
catererReg.termsNote: By registering you agree to our terms of service.
validation.licenseRequired: License / Registration Number is required and cannot be empty.
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters long

verification.subtitle: Your caterer profile and current verification status
verification.payoutBlockedDesc: Payouts will be released once your account is verified.
verification.verifiedNote: Your account is verified. Payouts are active.
verification.banner.pending: Your registration is currently under review. Payouts are blocked until verification is complete.
verification.banner.under_review: Your account is being actively reviewed. We will contact you if we have any questions.
verification.banner.rejected: Your registration was rejected. Please contact our support team.
verification.banner.suspended: Your account has been temporarily suspended. Please contact our support team.

pkg.form.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Premium Wedding Catering with Full Service
pkg.form.summaryPlaceholder: 1–2 sentences that capture the essence of your package.
pkg.form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your package in detail: the experience, special dishes, service style, flow …
pkg.form.serviceAreaPlaceholder: e.g. Berlin, Hamburg, all of Germany
pkg.form.featuredDesc: Featured packages are highlighted on the website.
pkg.tip.title1: Use specific terms — e.g. "Wedding Buffet" rather than just "Package".
pkg.tip.title2: Start with the occasion or cuisine for better discoverability.
pkg.tip.title3: Aim for 40–70 characters for maximum readability.
pkg.tip.desc1: Describe the experience, not just the list of items.
pkg.tip.desc2: Mention special ingredients or highlight dishes.
pkg.tip.desc3: Explain what makes your offering unique.
pkg.tip.image1: Use bright, professional photos with good lighting.
pkg.tip.image2: Show both the food and the atmosphere.
pkg.tip.image3: Recommended: min. 1200×800 px, JPG or WebP.
pkg.validation.guestsRequired: Min. and max. guests are required.
pkg.validation.guestsOrder: Min. guests cannot be greater than max. guests.
pkg.validation.summaryRequired: Short summary is required for publishing.
pkg.validation.descRequired: Full description is required for publishing.
pkg.wizard.guestsOrder: Min guests cannot exceed max guests.
pkg.wizard.cityDropdownPlaceholder: Select a city from the list...
pkg.wizard.cityCustomPlaceholder: Or type any city and press Enter
pkg.wizard.publishDesc: Makes this package visible to customers
error.notLoggedIn: Not logged in. Please sign in.
error.catererNotFound: Caterer profile not found. Please contact support.
error.forbidden: You are not authorized to perform this action.
error.auth: Authentication error. Please sign in again.

home.why.title: A stronger product experience than a simple caterer list.
home.why.subtitle: Speisely should feel premium, guided, and useful from the first click. The website introduces the brand, and the product flow helps users move naturally into planning their event.

marketplace.heroTitle: Discover catering partners for exceptional events.
marketplace.heroSubtitle: Explore selected caterers for weddings, corporate events, private celebrations, and premium hospitality formats.
about.directionTitle: Speisely is not a generic directory. It is a guided path from event idea to the right catering solution.
about.whyText: Event catering requires context: budget, guest count, cuisine, service style, location, and atmosphere all need to fit together. Speisely makes this information visible early and helps customers make better decisions.
forCaterers.leadsTitle: Fewer random leads. More suitable events.
forCaterers.leadsText: Customers describe their event with budget, guest count, location, style, and special requirements. Speisely structures this information before caterers are contacted.
request.label: AI catering concierge
request.title: Describe your event once.
request.description: Use natural language. Speisely detects event type, guests, location, budget, dietary needs and catering style before matching you with caterers.
request.aiNoteTitle: AI matching starts after this step
request.aiNote: You will review a compact event brief next. No repeated long form — only key details and suggested caterers.
request.flowText: Speisely turns your message into a structured request and prepares caterer matching.
